description: Open-source DRC tool — PVS alternative for semiconductor layout verification

sessions.title: KLayout integration, e2e tests, memory profiling, DRC flag fix
completed: KLayout CLI confirmed working (macOS app bundle auto-detected)
Fixed latent bug: DRC deck disabled all rule groups by default — added DEFAULT_DRC_FLAGS
8 e2e integration tests with real KLayout (clean/violating/multi-layer GDS, PDK mapping, adaptive strategy)
9 memory profiling tests (RSS measurement, scaling estimates ~64 bytes/poly, 2GB guard)
Fixed 4 unit tests that assumed KLayout absent
303 total tests (286 unit + 17 integration) all passing

sessions.title: Adaptive DRC for resource-constrained environments
completed: Adaptive DRC strategy — auto-selects threads/mode by GDS file size

sessions.title: Phase 4 complete (Production Hardening)
next: Install KLayout CLI for integration tests
